stories.title: capabilities thresholds + session-start extensions + hitl-protocol updates
acceptanceCriteria: capabilities/claude-code.json contains thresholds object with hitl_timeout_hours=24, hitl_strike_limit=3, context_checkpoint_pct=35, context_blocked_pct=25, loop_max_iterations=50
hooks/session-start.sh reads thresholds and exports MULTICA_HITL_TIMEOUT_HOURS, MULTICA_HITL_STRIKE_LIMIT, MULTICA_CONTEXT_CHECKPOINT_PCT, MULTICA_CONTEXT_BLOCKED_PCT, MULTICA_LOOP_MAX_ITERATIONS
hooks/session-start.sh detects .multica/state/consolidation-prompt.txt, injects as first context_part with '## Memory Consolidation Task' header, then deletes the file
hooks/session-start.sh detects HITL timeout via hitl-bounces.json last_at field, injects [HITL:timeout] context when > MULTICA_HITL_TIMEOUT_HOURS hours
skills/core/hitl-protocol.md contains HITL timeout auto-degradation rule referencing $MULTICA_HITL_TIMEOUT_HOURS
skills/core/hitl-protocol.md HITL comment format includes phase= field: '[HITL] phase=<current_phase> question_id=<uuid>'
shellcheck hooks/session-start.sh reports no error-level findings

stories.title: multica-workflow + persistence-loop skill updates
acceptanceCriteria: skills/core/multica-workflow.md phase transition comments include [phase] prefix format example: '[phase] discover→plan'
skills/core/multica-workflow.md context budget section references $MULTICA_CONTEXT_CHECKPOINT_PCT and $MULTICA_CONTEXT_BLOCKED_PCT instead of hardcoded 35/25
skills/advanced/persistence-loop.md max_iterations references $MULTICA_LOOP_MAX_ITERATIONS instead of hardcoded 50

stories.title: docs updates + VERSION bump
acceptanceCriteria: KNOWN-LIMITATIONS.md contains prominent warning about git repository requirement for learnings sync
CLAUDE.md Hooks Registration section contains note about paths resolved at install time
CHANGELOG.md contains [0.5.0] entry with v0.5.0 features
